<!DOCTYPE html>
        <html lang="en">
        <head>
          <meta http-equiv="content-type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8">
          <title>Page not found at /api/v1/stores//</title>
          <meta name="robots" content="NONE,NOARCHIVE">
          <style>
            html * { padding:0; margin:0; }
            body * { padding:10px 20px; }
            body * * { padding:0; }
            body { font-family: sans-serif; background:#eee; color:#000; }
            body > :where(header, main, footer) { border-bottom:1px solid #ddd; }
            h1 { font-weight:normal; margin-bottom:.4em; }
            h1 small { font-size:60%; color:#666; font-weight:normal; }
            table { border:none; border-collapse: collapse; width:100%; }
            td, th { vertical-align:top; padding:2px 3px; }
            th { width:12em; text-align:right; color:#666; padding-right:.5em; }
            #info { background:#f6f6f6; }
            #info ol { margin: 0.5em 4em; }
            #info ol li { font-family: monospace; }
            #summary { background: #ffc; }
            #explanation { background:#eee; border-bottom: 0px none; }
            pre.exception_value { font-family: sans-serif; color: #575757; font-size: 1.5em; margin: 10px 0 10px 0; }
          </style>
        </head>
        <body>
          <header id="summary">
            <h1>Page not found <small>(404)</small></h1>
            
            <table class="meta">
              <tr>
                <th scope="row">Request Method:</th>
                <td>GET</td>
              </tr>
              <tr>
                <th scope="row">Request URL:</th>
                <td>http://localhost:8000/api/v1/stores//</td>
              </tr>
              
            </table>
          </header>
        
          <main id="info">

<!DOCTYPE html>
        <html lang="en">
        <head>
          <meta http-equiv="content-type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8">
          <title>Page not found at /api/v1/stores//</title>
          <meta name="robots" content="NONE,NOARCHIVE">
          <style>
            html * { padding:0; margin:0; }
            body * { padding:10px 20px; }
            body * * { padding:0; }
            body { font-family: sans-serif; background:#eee; color:#000; }
            body > :where(header, main, footer) { border-bottom:1px solid #ddd; }
            h1 { font-weight:normal; margin-bottom:.4em; }
            h1 small { font-size:60%; color:#666; font-weight:normal; }
            table { border:none; border-collapse: collapse; width:100%; }
            td, th { vertical-align:top; padding:2px 3px; }
            th { width:12em; text-align:right; color:#666; padding-right:.5em; }
            #info { background:#f6f6f6; }
            #info ol { margin: 0.5em 4em; }
            #info ol li { font-family: monospace; }
            #summary { background: #ffc; }
            #explanation { background:#eee; border-bottom: 0px none; }
            pre.exception_value { font-family: sans-serif; color: #575757; font-size: 1.5em; margin: 10px 0 10px 0; }
          </style>
        </head>
        <body>

            <h1>Page not found <small>(404)</small></h1>

<!DOCTYPE html>
        <html lang="en">
        <head>
          <meta http-equiv="content-type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8">
          <title>Page not found at /api/v1/stores//slides/</title>
          <meta name="robots" content="NONE,NOARCHIVE">
          <style>
            html * { padding:0; margin:0; }
            body * { padding:10px 20px; }
            body * * { padding:0; }
            body { font-family: sans-serif; background:#eee; color:#000; }
            body > :where(header, main, footer) { border-bottom:1px solid #ddd; }
            h1 { font-weight:normal; margin-bottom:.4em; }
            h1 small { font-size:60%; color:#666; font-weight:normal; }
            table { border:none; border-collapse: collapse; width:100%; }
            td, th { vertical-align:top; padding:2px 3px; }
            th { width:12em; text-align:right; color:#666; padding-right:.5em; }
            #info { background:#f6f6f6; }
            #info ol { margin: 0.5em 4em; }
            #info ol li { font-family: monospace; }
            #summary { background: #ffc; }
            #explanation { background:#eee; border-bottom: 0px none; }
            pre.exception_value { font-family: sans-serif; color: #575757; font-size: 1.5em; margin: 10px 0 10px 0; }
          </style>
        </head>
        <body>
          <header id="summary">

          <footer id="explanation">
            <p>
              You’re seeing this error because you have <code>DEBUG = True</code> in
              your Django settings file. Change that to <code>False</code>, and Django
              will display a standard 404 page.
            </p>
          </footer>
        </body>
        </html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
        <html lang="en">
        <head>
          <meta http-equiv="content-type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8">
          <title>Page not found at /api/v1/products//</title>
          <meta name="robots" content="NONE,NOARCHIVE">
          <style>
            html * { padding:0; margin:0; }
            body * { padding:10px 20px; }
            body * * { padding:0; }
            body { font-family: sans-serif; background:#eee; color:#000; }
            body > :where(header, main, footer) { border-bottom:1px solid #ddd; }
            h1 { font-weight:normal; margin-bottom:.4em; }
            h1 small { font-size:60%; color:#666; font-weight:normal; }
            table { border:none; border-collapse: collapse; width:100%; }
            td, th { vertical-align:top; padding:2px 3px; }
            th { width:12em; text-align:right; color:#666; padding-right:.5em; }
            #info { background:#f6f6f6; }
            #info ol { margin: 0.5em 4em; }
            #info ol li { font-family: monospace; }
            #summary { background: #ffc; }
            #explanation { background:#eee; border-bottom: 0px none; }
            pre.exception_value { font-family: sans-serif; color: #575757; font-size: 1.5em; margin: 10px 0 10px 0; }
          </style>
        </head>
        <body>
          <header id="summary">
            <h1>Page not found <small>(404)</small></h1>
            
            <table class="meta">

                <th scope="row">Request Method:</th>

              </tr>
              <tr>
                <th scope="row">Request URL:</th>
                <td>http://localhost:8000/api/v1/products//</td>

          </header>

          <footer id="explanation">
            <p>

<!DOCTYPE html>
        <html lang="en">
        <head>
          <meta http-equiv="content-type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8">
          <title>Page not found at /api/v1/orders//</title>
          <meta name="robots" content="NONE,NOARCHIVE">
          <style>
            html * { padding:0; margin:0; }
            body * { padding:10px 20px; }
            body * * { padding:0; }
            body { font-family: sans-serif; background:#eee; color:#000; }
            body > :where(header, main, footer) { border-bottom:1px solid #ddd; }
            h1 { font-weight:normal; margin-bottom:.4em; }
            h1 small { font-size:60%; color:#666; font-weight:normal; }
            table { border:none; border-collapse: collapse; width:100%; }
            td, th { vertical-align:top; padding:2px 3px; }
            th { width:12em; text-align:right; color:#666; padding-right:.5em; }
            #info { background:#f6f6f6; }
            #info ol { margin: 0.5em 4em; }
            #info ol li { font-family: monospace; }
            #summary { background: #ffc; }
            #explanation { background:#eee; border-bottom: 0px none; }
            pre.exception_value { font-family: sans-serif; color: #575757; font-size: 1.5em; margin: 10px 0 10px 0; }
          </style>
        </head>
        <body>
          <header id="summary">
            <h1>Page not found <small>(404)</small></h1>
            
            <table class="meta">
              <tr>
                <th scope="row">Request Method:</th>
                <td>GET</td>
              </tr>
              <tr>
                <th scope="row">Request URL:</th>
                <td>http://localhost:8000/api/v1/orders//</td>
              </tr>
              
            </table>
          </header>
        
          <main id="info">
            
              <p>
              Using the URLconf defined in <code>config.urls</code>,
              Django tried these URL patterns, in this order:
              </p>
              <ol>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        health/
                        [name='health-check']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        health/deep/
                        [name='deep-health-check']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        admin/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        accounts/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        countryapi/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        stores/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        products/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        orders/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        
                        [name='order-list']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        orders/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        get-multiple/
                        [name='order-get-multiple']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        orders/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        multiple-delete/
                        [name='order-multiple-delete']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        orders/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        my/
                        [name='order-my-list']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        orders/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        history/list/
                        [name='order-history-list']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        orders/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        track/
                        [name='order-track']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        orders/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        &lt;int:pk&gt;/
                        [name='order-detail']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        orders/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        &lt;int:pk&gt;/upload-check/
                        [name='order-upload-check']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        employees/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        notifications/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/schema/
                        [name='schema']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        swagger/
                        [name='swagger-ui']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        redoc/
                        [name='redoc']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        ^media/(?P&lt;path&gt;.*)$
                        
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        ^static/(?P&lt;path&gt;.*)$
                        
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
              </ol>
              <p>
                
                  The current path, <code>api/v1/orders//</code>,
                
                didn’t match any of these.
              </p>
            
          </main>
        
          <footer id="explanation">
            <p>
              You’re seeing this error because you have <code>DEBUG = True</code> in
              your Django settings file. Change that to <code>False</code>, and Django
              will display a standard 404 page.
            </p>
          </footer>
        </body>
        </html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
        <html lang="en">
        <head>
          <meta http-equiv="content-type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8">
          <title>Page not found at /api/v1/orders//</title>
          <meta name="robots" content="NONE,NOARCHIVE">
          <style>
            html * { padding:0; margin:0; }
            body * { padding:10px 20px; }
            body * * { padding:0; }
            body { font-family: sans-serif; background:#eee; color:#000; }
            body > :where(header, main, footer) { border-bottom:1px solid #ddd; }
            h1 { font-weight:normal; margin-bottom:.4em; }
            h1 small { font-size:60%; color:#666; font-weight:normal; }
            table { border:none; border-collapse: collapse; width:100%; }
            td, th { vertical-align:top; padding:2px 3px; }
            th { width:12em; text-align:right; color:#666; padding-right:.5em; }
            #info { background:#f6f6f6; }
            #info ol { margin: 0.5em 4em; }
            #info ol li { font-family: monospace; }
            #summary { background: #ffc; }
            #explanation { background:#eee; border-bottom: 0px none; }
            pre.exception_value { font-family: sans-serif; color: #575757; font-size: 1.5em; margin: 10px 0 10px 0; }
          </style>
        </head>

              <p>

                didn’t match any of these.
              </p>
            
          </main>
        
          <footer id="explanation">
            <p>
              You’re seeing this error because you have <code>DEBUG = True</code> in
              your Django settings file. Change that to <code>False</code>, and Django
              will display a standard 404 page.

Host localhost:8000

<!DOCTYPE html>
        <html lang="en">
        <head>
          <meta http-equiv="content-type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8">
          <title>Page not found at /api/v1/orders//</title>
          <meta name="robots" content="NONE,NOARCHIVE">
          <style>
            html * { padding:0; margin:0; }
            body * { padding:10px 20px; }
            body * * { padding:0; }
            body { font-family: sans-serif; background:#eee; color:#000; }
            body > :where(header, main, footer) { border-bottom:1px solid #ddd; }
            h1 { font-weight:normal; margin-bottom:.4em; }
            h1 small { font-size:60%; color:#666; font-weight:normal; }
            table { border:none; border-collapse: collapse; width:100%; }
            td, th { vertical-align:top; padding:2px 3px; }
            th { width:12em; text-align:right; color:#666; padding-right:.5em; }
            #info { background:#f6f6f6; }
            #info ol { margin: 0.5em 4em; }
            #info ol li { font-family: monospace; }
            #summary { background: #ffc; }
            #explanation { background:#eee; border-bottom: 0px none; }
            pre.exception_value { font-family: sans-serif; color: #575757; font-size: 1.5em; margin: 10px 0 10px 0; }
          </style>
        </head>
        <body>
          <header id="summary">
            <h1>Page not found <small>(404)</small></h1>
            
            <table class="meta">
              <tr>
                <th scope="row">Request Method:</th>
                <td>DELETE</td>
              </tr>
              <tr>
                <th scope="row">Request URL:</th>
                <td>http://localhost:8000/api/v1/orders//</td>
              </tr>
              
            </table>
          </header>
        
          <main id="info">
            
              <p>
              Using the URLconf defined in <code>config.urls</code>,
              Django tried these URL patterns, in this order:
              </p>
              <ol>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        health/
                        [name='health-check']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        health/deep/
                        [name='deep-health-check']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        admin/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        accounts/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        countryapi/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        stores/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        products/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        orders/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        
                        [name='order-list']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        orders/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        get-multiple/
                        [name='order-get-multiple']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        orders/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        multiple-delete/
                        [name='order-multiple-delete']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        orders/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        my/
                        [name='order-my-list']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        orders/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        history/list/
                        [name='order-history-list']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        orders/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        track/
                        [name='order-track']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        orders/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        &lt;int:pk&gt;/
                        [name='order-detail']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        orders/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        &lt;int:pk&gt;/upload-check/
                        [name='order-upload-check']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        employees/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        notifications/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/schema/
                        [name='schema']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        swagger/
                        [name='swagger-ui']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        redoc/
                        [name='redoc']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        ^media/(?P&lt;path&gt;.*)$
                        
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        ^static/(?P&lt;path&gt;.*)$
                        
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
              </ol>
              <p>
                
                  The current path, <code>api/v1/orders//</code>,
                
                didn’t match any of these.
              </p>
            
          </main>
        
          <footer id="explanation">
            <p>
              You’re seeing this error because you have <code>DEBUG = True</code> in
              your Django settings file. Change that to <code>False</code>, and Django
              will display a standard 404 page.
            </p>
          </footer>
        </body>
        </html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
        <html lang="en">
        <head>
          <meta http-equiv="content-type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8">
          <title>Page not found at /api/v1/orders//upload-check/</title>
          <meta name="robots" content="NONE,NOARCHIVE">
          <style>
            html * { padding:0; margin:0; }
            body * { padding:10px 20px; }
            body * * { padding:0; }
            body { font-family: sans-serif; background:#eee; color:#000; }
            body > :where(header, main, footer) { border-bottom:1px solid #ddd; }
            h1 { font-weight:normal; margin-bottom:.4em; }
            h1 small { font-size:60%; color:#666; font-weight:normal; }
            table { border:none; border-collapse: collapse; width:100%; }
            td, th { vertical-align:top; padding:2px 3px; }
            th { width:12em; text-align:right; color:#666; padding-right:.5em; }
            #info { background:#f6f6f6; }
            #info ol { margin: 0.5em 4em; }
            #info ol li { font-family: monospace; }
            #summary { background: #ffc; }
            #explanation { background:#eee; border-bottom: 0px none; }
            pre.exception_value { font-family: sans-serif; color: #575757; font-size: 1.5em; margin: 10px 0 10px 0; }

<!DOCTYPE html>
        <html lang="en">
        <head>
          <meta http-equiv="content-type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8">
          <title>Page not found at /api/v1/employees//</title>
          <meta name="robots" content="NONE,NOARCHIVE">
          <style>
            html * { padding:0; margin:0; }
            body * { padding:10px 20px; }
            body * * { padding:0; }
            body { font-family: sans-serif; background:#eee; color:#000; }
            body > :where(header, main, footer) { border-bottom:1px solid #ddd; }
            h1 { font-weight:normal; margin-bottom:.4em; }
            h1 small { font-size:60%; color:#666; font-weight:normal; }
            table { border:none; border-collapse: collapse; width:100%; }
            td, th { vertical-align:top; padding:2px 3px; }
            th { width:12em; text-align:right; color:#666; padding-right:.5em; }
            #info { background:#f6f6f6; }
            #info ol { margin: 0.5em 4em; }
            #info ol li { font-family: monospace; }
            #summary { background: #ffc; }
            #explanation { background:#eee; border-bottom: 0px none; }
            pre.exception_value { font-family: sans-serif; color: #575757; font-size: 1.5em; margin: 10px 0 10px 0; }
          </style>
        </head>
        <body>
          <header id="summary">
            <h1>Page not found <small>(404)</small></h1>
            
            <table class="meta">
              <tr>
                <th scope="row">Request Method:</th>
                <td>GET</td>
              </tr>
              <tr>
                <th scope="row">Request URL:</th>
                <td>http://localhost:8000/api/v1/employees//</td>
              </tr>
              
            </table>
          </header>
        
          <main id="info">
            
              <p>
              Using the URLconf defined in <code>config.urls</code>,
              Django tried these URL patterns, in this order:
              </p>
              <ol>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        health/
                        [name='health-check']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        health/deep/
                        [name='deep-health-check']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        admin/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        accounts/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        countryapi/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        stores/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        products/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        orders/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        employees/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        
                        [name='employee-list']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        employees/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        multiple-delete/
                        [name='employee-multiple-delete']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        employees/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        auth/login/
                        [name='employee-login']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        employees/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        auth/logout/
                        [name='employee-logout']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        employees/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        &lt;int:pk&gt;/
                        [name='employee-detail']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/v1/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                      <code>
                        notifications/
                        
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        api/schema/
                        [name='schema']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        swagger/
                        [name='swagger-ui']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        redoc/
                        [name='redoc']
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        ^media/(?P&lt;path&gt;.*)$
                        
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
                  <li>
                    
                      <code>
                        ^static/(?P&lt;path&gt;.*)$
                        
                      </code>
                    
                  </li>
                
              </ol>
              <p>
                
                  The current path, <code>api/v1/employees//</code>,
                
                didn’t match any of these.
              </p>
            
          </main>
        
          <footer id="explanation">
            <p>
              You’re seeing this error because you have <code>DEBUG = True</code> in
              your Django settings file. Change that to <code>False</code>, and Django
              will display a standard 404 page.
            </p>
          </footer>
        </body>
        </html>
